concepts_used.title: 多元回归
concepts_used.how_used: 使用多元回归分析，以年份为自变量，预测美国各州淡水取水量（2010-2025）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Thus, we apply regression analysis to the construction of our estimation model, which is a statistical tool for the investigation of relations between variables.

concepts_used.title: 最小生成树（Prim、Kruskal）
concepts_used.how_used: 构建最大生成树模型，确定水资源调运的最短路径，并参考中国南水北调工程计算成本。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Also, we have built a model of max spanning tree to get the shortest route of transfer.

concepts_used.title: 层次分析法（AHP）
concepts_used.how_used: 使用层次分析法（AHP）评估不同水资源策略在经济、物理、文化和环境方面的影响，包括构建层次结构、比较矩阵、权重计算和一致性检验。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The fifth model is devoted to the economic, physical, cultural and environmental impact of different measures discussed above by using Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP).

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 对淡水取水量数据应用线性回归，以年份为自变量进行趋势预测。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Thus, we apply regression analysis to the construction of our estimation model, which is a statistical tool for the investigation of relations between variables.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出模型假设，如人口迁移、改革、冰川融化等，并给出理由。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1. The states we choose for modeling will not experience mass migrations of population. 2. Sweeping reforms will not be implemented... 3. The increase in fresh water storage from the thaw of glaciers... is not considered.

concepts_used.title: 图表标题与编号规范
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中插入了多张图表，并配有标题和编号，如百分比饼图、人口增长图、地图等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Percentages of fresh water withdrawals by categories are shown as follows: [Figure]

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用地图展示美国各州淡水使用分布，并标注了选取的22个代表州。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The US state-level distribution of fresh water uses is shown by the following map, extracted from ESTIMATED USE OF WATER IN THE UNITED STATES IN 2005.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 在回归模型中，通过误差度量评估预测精度，但论文未明确给出具体指标，仅提及“appropriate level of accuracy”。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We have taken an appropriate level of accuracy based on the usage of the data.
